## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Webstacks and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance metrics, and optimization efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/FCDvKiuS2M3R7ixS4nced3S-5am27zJo?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance: 116 articles published, 643 clicks (best week yet), 258.1k impressions](https://fathom.video/share/FCDvKiuS2M3R7ixS4nced3S-5am27zJo?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
  - [New content strategy: Focusing on B2B SaaS topics, prioritizing higher search volume keywords](https://fathom.video/share/FCDvKiuS2M3R7ixS4nced3S-5am27zJo?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Content enrichment: Developing framework to enhance top-performing articles with new content, stats, and visuals](https://fathom.video/share/FCDvKiuS2M3R7ixS4nced3S-5am27zJo?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Conversion optimization: Current rate at 0.5% for GrowthX content, aiming for 1-2% benchmark](https://fathom.video/share/FCDvKiuS2M3R7ixS4nced3S-5am27zJo?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Metrics

  - [116 articles published in total](https://fathom.video/share/FCDvKiuS2M3R7ixS4nced3S-5am27zJo?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
  - [121 clicks week-over-week, best performance yet](https://fathom.video/share/FCDvKiuS2M3R7ixS4nced3S-5am27zJo?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
  - [643 total clicks, 258.1k impressions](https://fathom.video/share/FCDvKiuS2M3R7ixS4nced3S-5am27zJo?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
  - [UX design and CMS comparison articles performing well](https://fathom.video/share/FCDvKiuS2M3R7ixS4nced3S-5am27zJo?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)

### Content Strategy Updates

  - [New topic clusters added: web design costs, static vs dynamic websites, landing pages, slow-loading websites](https://fathom.video/share/FCDvKiuS2M3R7ixS4nced3S-5am27zJo?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Focusing on B2B SaaS-related topics](https://fathom.video/share/FCDvKiuS2M3R7ixS4nced3S-5am27zJo?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
  - [Prioritizing keywords with higher search volumes to increase clicks](https://fathom.video/share/FCDvKiuS2M3R7ixS4nced3S-5am27zJo?tab=summary&timestamp=457.0)
  - [Developing framework for prioritizing articles for enhancement](https://fathom.video/share/FCDvKiuS2M3R7ixS4nced3S-5am27zJo?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### Content Enrichment Plans

  - [Enhancing top-performing articles with new content, stats, figures, and illustrations](https://fathom.video/share/FCDvKiuS2M3R7ixS4nced3S-5am27zJo?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)
  - [Creating infographics and visual summaries for key sections](https://fathom.video/share/FCDvKiuS2M3R7ixS4nced3S-5am27zJo?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)
  - [Developing workflow to automate adding relevant website examples to content](https://fathom.video/share/FCDvKiuS2M3R7ixS4nced3S-5am27zJo?tab=summary&timestamp=665.0)
  - [Updating metadata for high-impression, low-click articles](https://fathom.video/share/FCDvKiuS2M3R7ixS4nced3S-5am27zJo?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)

### Conversion Rate Analysis

  - [AI content (Jul-Aug): 2,700 clicks, 49 leads, 1.8% conversion rate](https://fathom.video/share/FCDvKiuS2M3R7ixS4nced3S-5am27zJo?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)
  - [Hand-written content (3 months): 31,000 clicks, 319 leads, 1% conversion rate](https://fathom.video/share/FCDvKiuS2M3R7ixS4nced3S-5am27zJo?tab=summary&timestamp=813.0)
  - [GrowthX content: 535 clicks, 3 leads, 0.5% conversion rate](https://fathom.video/share/FCDvKiuS2M3R7ixS4nced3S-5am27zJo?tab=summary&timestamp=835.0)
  - [Goal: Improve GrowthX content conversion rate to 1-2% benchmark](https://fathom.video/share/FCDvKiuS2M3R7ixS4nced3S-5am27zJo?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)

### Content Refresh Strategy

  - Shifting focus to refreshing underperforming articles (\< 10 clicks, published 5-6 weeks ago)
  - [New V2 refresher workflow generates fact sheet for enrichment and rewrites original article](https://fathom.video/share/FCDvKiuS2M3R7ixS4nced3S-5am27zJo?tab=summary&timestamp=1207.0)
  - [Utilizing You.com instead of Perplexity for improved data relevance](https://fathom.video/share/FCDvKiuS2M3R7ixS4nced3S-5am27zJo?tab=summary&timestamp=1303.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Devon to review and prioritize new topic suggestions](https://fathom.video/share/FCDvKiuS2M3R7ixS4nced3S-5am27zJo?tab=summary&timestamp=1371.0)
  - [Andrej to complete conversion panel optimizations and report back via Slack](https://fathom.video/share/FCDvKiuS2M3R7ixS4nced3S-5am27zJo?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
  - [Focus on higher search volume keywords for new content](https://fathom.video/share/FCDvKiuS2M3R7ixS4nced3S-5am27zJo?tab=summary&timestamp=457.0)
  - [Implement content enrichment strategy for top-performing articles](https://fathom.video/share/FCDvKiuS2M3R7ixS4nced3S-5am27zJo?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Begin refreshing underperforming articles from September onwards](https://fathom.video/share/FCDvKiuS2M3R7ixS4nced3S-5am27zJo?tab=summary&timestamp=1484.0)
  - [Andrej to send keyword research data sheet to Devon](https://fathom.video/share/FCDvKiuS2M3R7ixS4nced3S-5am27zJo?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
  - [Andrej to provide a Slack update summarizing the meeting discussion](https://fathom.video/share/FCDvKiuS2M3R7ixS4nced3S-5am27zJo?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
